notes: First PDB-based baseline using 5nrl spliceosome rigid-body trajectory (3 subcomplexes, symmetric rotation). Replaces compact-support volumes as the default test.
volumes_source: 5nrl spliceosome (PDB), 50 volumes, grid_size=64, voxel_size=8.5A, Bfactor=80, max_rotation=10deg, path=path_symmetric
